title: Yellow Fever Virus Replication in Cell Culture
author: Izabela M Rezende
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.pw6dphe

steps.title: Remove and discard the cell culture...
steps.instruction: Remove and discard the cell culture media from the culture vessel.

steps.title: Wash cells using PBS (approximately 2...
steps.instruction: Wash cells using PBS (approximately 2 mL per 10 cm2 culture surface area). Gently add wash solution to the side of the vessel opposite the attached cell layer and wash the cells.

steps.title: Shaking the flask slightly and using...
steps.instruction: Shaking the flask slightly and using a pipette resuspend the cells in a minimal volume of pre-warmed Leibovit’z with 5% BFS and remove a sample for counting.

steps.title: Using a cell counter, determine the...
steps.instruction: Using a cell counter, determine the number of cells/mL and adjust the number of cells to 65,000 C6/36 cells/mL.

steps.title: Inoculate in the bottom of a...
steps.instruction: Inoculate in the bottom of a cell culture tube 100,000 C6/36 cells in 1.5 mL of Leibovit’z medium supplemented with 5% BFS.

steps.title: Keep the tubes inclined to 45 degrees at 28oC
steps.instruction: Keep the tubes inclined to 45 degrees at 28oC.

steps.title: After 12-16 hours, remove and discard...
steps.instruction: After 12-16 hours, remove and discard the media using a sterile pipette.

steps.title: Wash the cells twice with phosphate buffered saline
steps.instruction: Wash the cells twice with phosphate buffered saline.

steps.title: Add 100 µl of a solution...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µl of a solution containing 20 µL of sera and 80 µL of Leibovit’z medium.

steps.title: Incubate the cells for 1 hour at 28oC
steps.instruction: Incubate the cells for 1 hour at 28oC.

steps.title: After adsorption, add 1,5mL of Leibovit’z...
steps.instruction: After adsorption, add 1,5mL of Leibovit’z medium supplemented with 2% BFS and incubate the cells at at 28oC.

steps.title: Observe the cells daily in an...
steps.instruction: Observe the cells daily in an inverted microscope up to the observation of cytopathic effect or up to 10 days.

steps.title: Collect the supernatant, make aliquots and kept them at -70°C
steps.instruction: Collect the supernatant, make aliquots and kept them at -70°C. You can use this supernatant for other blind passages aiming viral isolation or to perform RNA extraction and further molecular analysis.
